ItacPersonItem.Notes: In his youth, Imperiale was the founder of the Mutoli Academy in Genoa, and member of the Addormentati Academy in Genoa. See his biography by Emilio Russo and Franco Pignatti in DBI, and Renato Martinoni, Gian Vincenzo Imperiale politico, letterato e collezionista genovese sel Seicento (Padova, Antenore, 1983).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
